programme.title: Xplash Ep110
programme.desc: Xplash brings you amazing action in, on, and near water. In this episode, we travel to the Bahamas and witness a world freediving record, fish for crocodiles with coconuts on a rope, and start the show off by checking out a new evolution in human flight.

programme.title: The Great Barrier Reef: World's most amazing coral reef
programme.desc: This expedition to the Great Barrier Reef is designed to study the health and resilience of one of the world’s most amazing coral reefs. The expedition’s goal is to collect data about the world's most remote reefs and build a picture of how reefs are faring in today's changing climate.

programme.title: Sports Adventure Ep503: The Wellerbrucke Rapids… A Kayaker’s Dream
programme.desc: The Wellerbrucke rapid is a world class kayaker’s dream. Not only offering up great freestyle adventures, it also hosts the Adidas Sick-line Extreme Kayak Championships. This competition is seen through the eyes of 3-time champion Sam Sutton.

programme.title: Water Matters Ep101 - Freshwater
programme.desc: Water Matters documents water-related environmental issues from around the globe as a number of the world’s best documentary filmmakers and environmental organizations share their stories regarding the planet’s water crisis as well as potential solutions for a healthier world.

programme.title: Facing Waves Ep507: Paddling The Galapagos Islands
programme.desc: Facing Waves travels to Ecuador to explore the Galapagos Islands - one of the world's most spectacular and biodiverse regions.

programme.title: Next Stop Ep209: Queensland, Australia
programme.desc: Next Stop visits Queensland, Australia and explores The Great Barrier Reef, Cairns Tropical Zoo, the Daintree Discovery Centre and Tjapukai Aboriginal Cultural Park.

programme.title: The Blue Realm Ep112: Deep White - Why Sharks Attack
programme.desc: Deep White explores ways to research sharks to determine why sharks attack and to study innovative ways to train sharks in order to prevent future attacks. Sharks are surprisingly intelligent and able to perform complex tasks. Sharks can distinguish different signals and cues in feeding routines and they develop strong bonds with their trainers.

programme.title: Xplash Ep110
programme.desc: Xplash brings you amazing action in, on, and near water. In this episode, we travel to the Bahamas and witness a world freediving record, fish for crocodiles with coconuts on a rope, and start the show off by checking out a new evolution in human flight.

programme.title: The Great Barrier Reef: World's most amazing coral reef
programme.desc: This expedition to the Great Barrier Reef is designed to study the health and resilience of one of the world’s most amazing coral reefs. The expedition’s goal is to collect data about the world's most remote reefs and build a picture of how reefs are faring in today's changing climate.

programme.title: Sports Adventure Ep503: The Wellerbrucke Rapids… A Kayaker’s Dream
programme.desc: The Wellerbrucke rapid is a world class kayaker’s dream. Not only offering up great freestyle adventures, it also hosts the Adidas Sick-line Extreme Kayak Championships. This competition is seen through the eyes of 3-time champion Sam Sutton.

programme.title: Speak Two The Wind - Part 3: Belgium to Germany
programme.desc: In Episode 3, the Volcom Skate Team motorcycle through Belgium and Germany, ride skateboards, and visit The Picturebooks. Featuring Jonathan Thijs, Chris Pfanner, Jelle Keppens, Jackson Pilz, Jake Smith, Christian Vankelst, Lannie Rhoades, Fynn Grabke, Phillip Mirtschink, Claus Grabke, and Baumi.

programme.title: Speak Two The Wind - Part 4: Germany to Denmark
programme.desc: In Episode 4, the Volcom Skate Team ride through Germany and Denmark. In Copenhagen, they visit Motorious, a vintage motorcycle shop. Featuring Collin Provost, Arto Saari, Chris Pfanner, Jackson Pilz, Jake Smith, Christian Vankelst, Lannie Rhoades, Jelle Keppens, Jonathan Thijs and Kasper Krogh.

programme.title: Speak Two The Wind - Part 5: Denmark to Sweden
programme.desc: In Episode 5, the Volcom Skate Team ride motorcycles through Denmark and Sweden, go camping, and hang at Fücker Fest, a motorcycle festival in Sweden. Featuring Collin Provost, Chris Pfanner, Jackson Pilz, Arto Saari, Jake Smith, Christian Vankelst, Lannie Rhoades, Jelle Keppens, and Jonathan Thijs.

programme.title: Speak Two The Wind - Part 6: Mexico
programme.desc: In this bonus episode, skaters CJ Collins, Jackson Pilz, and others ride motorcycles between Mexico City and San Miguel de Allende. Featuring Collin Provost, CJ Collins, Braulio Sagas, Kervin Miranda, Luka Barrena, Arto Saari, Diego Espinoza, Ginther Estrada, Ryan Loughridge, and Lannie Rhoades.

programme.title: Volcom Presents: Teenrager
programme.desc: Skater CJ Collins is now part of the Toy Machine Blood Sucking Skateboard Company. To celebrate his son’s 13th birthday, father Chad Collins made a 13-minute edit of CJ footage he’s been compiling over the years. As the title says, CJ’s not a teenager, he’s a teenrager!

programme.title: Absinthe Films Presents: Stay Tuned
programme.desc: ‘Stay Tuned’ is a snowboard film. It is also a film about the need to stay tuned mentally and physically with the natural world. Featuring Mikkel Bang, Nicolas Müller, John Jackson, Brandon Cocard, Ben Ferguson, Red Gerard, Severin Van Der Meer, Dylan Alito, Judd Henkes, and Hans Mindnich.

programme.title: Volcom Presents: Yellow Flickers
programme.desc: Do the lines in the road countdown to a supposed arrival? Or are they added up within us, allowing us to grow?

programme.title: Terje Haakonsen - Relax If You Can
programme.desc: Terje Haakonsen and Leo Cittadella go snowskating at the vast Austrian ski resort of Ischgl. While enjoying a timeout along the Swiss-Austrian border, they discuss European cultural differences and similarities.

programme.title: Terje Haakonsen - Winter Leisure
programme.desc: Legendary snowboarder Terje Haakonsen finds new joy in riding small parks and mellow terrain wherever he goes, explaining, “What I like about snowskates is that it makes small hills big again.” Join us for this fascinating look at snowskate subculture.

programme.title: Balance
programme.desc: Legendary professional snowboarder David Carrier-Porcheron reflects on Surf, Skate, and Snow culture, taking a closer look at what brings balance and happiness to people’s lives. Join us for this thoughtful and exhilarating ride with DCP.

programme.title: Perspektiv
programme.desc: David Carrier-Porcheron is a titan in the snowboarding community. When the COVID-19 pandemic hit, DCP and family were left stranded in Costa Rica. Perspektiv tells the story of his return to snow after 13 months. Watch as he rediscovers his love of snowboarding, and why he can’t live without it.

programme.desc: [object Object]

programme.title: Absinthe Films Presents: NowHere
programme.desc: A 2010 winter journey with riders facing harsh conditions and deeper questions. This Absinthe Films documentary explores perception, purpose, and the fine line between feeling lost and finding where you truly belong.

programme.title: South Beach Classics
programme.desc: Ted, being the original character he is, charmed and negotiated his way around the Midwest, the Northeast, and throughout the Central and Southern American states, buying and selling Classic Cars in the only way he knows how: by haggling and wheeling and dealing.

programme.title: South Beach Classics
programme.desc: Need a classic car? If you're in Miami, where old-time autos fit in perfectly with the city's glitz and glamour, Ted Vernon is the man to see. The no-nonsense, gregarious Long Islander runs Florida's largest classic car dealership, where he buys, sells, trades and exchanges unique cars from a lot that houses more than 300 of them. His outgoing personality meshes seamlessly with the colourful collectibles he moves each day, helped by an eclectic shop crew affectionately dubbed `the gargoyles'.

programme.title: Homegrown Hunter TV
programme.desc: This is incredible to say the least--to hold his composure, focus on two specific bucks, and pass so many deer when he has a buck tag in his pocket. Mr. Kohnke has some patience! But that is what management of the deer herd is all about.

programme.title: Documentary - Abandoned Dreams
programme.desc: The abandoned boat dilemma is one of the most frustrating and alarming issues facing British Columbia's coastal communities. Reaching the end of their life cycle, with limited disposal options and almost no way to track ownership, hundreds of old boats are being left to rot, and sink or drift onto beaches and shorelines around our province. The result is a province-wide problem that affects coastal navigation, tourism and the environment. Abandoned Dreams looks into the root causes of this derelict boat epidemic and the future plans for safe boat disposal and recycling in BC.

programme.title: Patrick Botticelli's RV tours
programme.desc: Patrick shows us this amazing 1984 Blue Bird Wonder Lodge

programme.title: 5 Must Haves by ETJ
programme.desc: Tom and Cheri show us the must haves including the Blu Tech Water system!

programme.title: Oxfordshire Cup - Ferne Park vs Black Bears
programme.desc: As we reach the final countdown for the 18-goal Oxfordshire Cup, Ferne Park and Black Bears are set to play the final for the Oxfordshire Cup. Black Bears remains yet undefeated within the Oxfordshire Cup. Will Ferne Park be able to change the turns of the competition and raise victorious in the competition?Watch the final between Ferne Park and Black Bears on Horse TV.

programme.title: CSI2* Santander - Highlights
programme.desc: The traditional International Showjumping of Santander is about to happen in the Palacio de la Magdalena. The finest riders on both the national and international scene will make an appearance at the Campa de la Magdalena to enjoy one of the most demanding events in Spain.Join their fight to determine the best rider on their category with a 1.40m class jump off, on Horse TV.

programme.title: FEI Equestrian World - Episode 3
programme.desc: This time, we go to the United Arab Emirates with showjumper Abdullah Mohammed Al Marri and meet the next generation of farriers training at Myerscough College in the north west of England. Moreover, we reflect on the 2018 Longines FEI Jumping World Cup Final with defending champion Beezie Madden and we visit Ireland's dressage star Judy Reynolds in Germany.

programme.title: FEI Equestrian World - Episode 4
programme.desc: In this month's episode, we go behind the scenes with Patrik Kittel at the FEI Dressage World Cup Final in Gothenburg and follow the action to find out who will become the champion the year. We will also meet some of the sport's top athletes who have their sights on lifting the Longines FEI Jumping World Cup trophy and catch up on all the vaulting action from the finals in Saumur, France.

programme.title: Sunshine Tour - Episode 5 - Nations Cup Victoria Trophy
programme.desc: The equestrian instalations of Dehesa Montenmedio celebrate the Nations Cup. Among competition, the CSI2* Victoria Trophy with a maximum height of 1.45m offers winners the possibility to earn points in the Longines Ranking. This means all riders are eager to perform their best to reach the top in the Spanish facilities. Watch the best moments of the 2021 competition.

programme.title: Longines FEI Jumping Nations Cup - San Juan Capistrano (California)
programme.desc: [object Object]

programme.title: Banorte Trophy - Highlights
programme.desc: The two-round challenge for the Banorte Trophy has 40 riders competing in this CSI5* test of the LGCT Mexico. With a height of 1.55m with a jump-off, this course designed by Javier Trenor has 13 obstacles and 16 jumps and will prove to be problematic for the riders who will have to speed up and offer a clear performance in order to win.Watch the highlights of the Banorte Trophy 2019 edition inside the LGCT.

programme.title: time2Rlx - Landscape
programme.desc: Immerse ypurself in the breathtaking beauty of Zyuratkul National Park. This relaxation video showcases stunning aerial and ground footage, accompanied by soothing music, offering a serene escape.

programme.title: time2Rlx - Water
programme.desc: Immerse yourself in the beauty of the Red Sea’s underwater world, showcasing vibrant fish and rich marine life. Enjoy relaxing background music, perfect for reducing stress, aiding sleep, or simply unwinding after a long day.

programme.title: time2Rlx - Wildlife
programme.desc: Virtual safari through Chobe National Park with nature footage, diverse wildlife, and authentic animal sounds.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: The Nürburgring Nordschleife is known as the toughest speedway in the world. Together with race driver Hans-Joachim Stuck we take a look at the history of this iconic race track as well as the events and record attempts that have been taking place there.

programme.title: Put Your Car On TV
programme.desc: On Put Your Car On TV, car fans from the Middle East can have their darlings rated in terms of speed, style and sound. Included this time: a Nova SS, a special Honda Accord and a car clad in crystals.

programme.title: 4x4
programme.desc: Station Wagons like the Volvo V60 Polestar aren't just family vans anymore but basically very roomy sports cars. Mercedes followed a more luxurious approach with their E43 AMG T model. And: the ultimate powerhouse station wagon, the Audi RS6.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: Porsche's 911 Turbo S Cabriolet is a timelessly elegant all-rounder and nevertheless more of a cruiser than a sports vehicle. In direct contrast, the Rolls Royce Dawn provides luxury and elegance at a new level.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: With their new DB 11, Aston Martin heads towards the future at full throttle. Also: after its facelift the Nissan GTR presented itself freshly streamlined and more powerful than ever. And: Lamborghini's V10 fighting bull, the Huracán.

programme.title: Made in...
programme.desc: What happens to car models that were designed in a thriving market but are launched as final products in times of market crisis? We accompanied the development history of a new BMW model, which starts with a design pitch.

programme.title: Made in...
programme.desc: After a design competition eight BMW models are shortlisted and presented to 500 test customers. A jury recommends two models for the finale and then the winner of the design contest will be announced and produced.

programme.title: Made in...
programme.desc: With its length of up to 12 meters and its weight of 18 tons, the Performance by Volkner is the most extraordinary luxury motor home from Germany and one of the most exclusive caravans in the world.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: The Nürburgring Nordschleife is known as the toughest speedway in the world. Together with race driver Hans-Joachim Stuck we take a look at the history of this iconic race track as well as the events and record attempts that have been taking place there.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: Slippery or muddy roads and bad visibility are circumstances that often spoil driving pleasure in winter. We took two almost identical Porsche 911's to an icy test track. Also: drifting fun in the snow with the Suzuki SX4 S-Cross.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: The Ferrari 458 Speciale is a street-legal race car that fires up emotion. Driving it is unforgettable, just as it is the case with the McLaren 650S, a car that is as fast as the Ferrari but fascinates more on a technical than emotional level.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: Lexus was one of the pioneers when it comes to electric and hybrid cars. The brand's LS 600h, the BMW Active Hybrid 7 and the Porsche Panamera S E-Hybrid are prime examples of this mixture between combustion and electric propulsion.

programme.title: A Surfing Life: David Van Zyl
programme.desc: David Van Zyl is a young South-African surfer that is quickly gaining popularity and becoming a rising star on the pro-surfer scene. For surf connoisseurs, his name has made history in 2019 as the first International Surfer to ever win the Vans Pro competition in Hawaii. Before then, Hawaiian surfers had an undefeated upper hand that was finally overcome by this young underdog. He now faces new challenges to engrave his name in fame.Get ready to catch some South African waves with David Van Zyl and find out more about his lifestyle on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Golden Strokes of Guadeloupe
programme.desc: Join us on a journey through one of the most welcoming island of the Caribbean, Guadeloupe! Explore its natural habitats rich in colour and rhythmic sounds that hypnotize us in this dreamy destination.Golden Strokes of Guadeloupe takes us on a journey in the world of art as we meet a local artist whose art shines light on our modern habits. Discover this hub for scuba divers as you swim through Cousteau's underwater reserve, a breath-taking spot for all those who love diving into the clear blue waters of the Caribbean.Finally, come dance to the drumbeats of a Caribbean jam whilst allowing the contagious energy to move you. Not many islands lend themselves as well as Guadeloupe! Be sure not to miss our exciting excavation through this unforgettable island on the Golden Strokes of Guadeloupe, available on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: RORC Caribbean 600
programme.desc: The RORC Caribbean 600 is an exciting 600-mile offshore race that takes competitors around some of the most beautiful islands of the Caribbean. In its 12th edition, more than 73 boats from 22 countries joined in a competition with participants from over 37 different nationalities.The fleet is made up not only of professional sailors and their boats, but also with Corinthian amateurs that love this offshore race. As it is the only offshore race in the Caribbean, it gets the attention of the best sailors worldwide. The race starts and finishes in Antigua and weaves its way around 11 different islands including St. Maarten and Guadaloupe amongst them.Be part of this unique race across the Caribbean with Nautical Channel and find out what crew will raise with victory.

This is the first Sprint World Cup of the 2018 season, and 700 athletes from 62 nations have been battling it out for the top spot. Who will raise to the top as the best nation in the sport? Find out on the highlights of the 2018 Sprint World Cup 1 Szeged.

programme.title: City of Vultures 3
programme.desc: Richard joins in the drug trade, as advocates for reform urge him to change. G attempts to raise his son on Chicago's violent south side.

programme.title: A Gun for Jennifer
programme.desc: A woman comes to New York City from Ohio to escape an abusive husband and gets entangled with murderous female vigilantes who prey on abusive men.

programme.title: A Shot In The Dark
programme.desc: A baby is kidnapped in a Brazilian airport. Years later, the mother lives in Lisbon and works in a strip-tease bar so she can survive. When she is fired, she joins a gang of bank robbers...

programme.title: Alien Rising
programme.desc: A savvy ex-homeland security agent and martial arts expert is forced to a remote island to help the military unlock the secrets of an extraterrestrial technology.

programme.title: Temptation
programme.desc: A beautiful, young woman out on the town with friends is saved from the clutches of a serial rapist by an ancient but gorgeous vampire, but at what cost?

programme.title: Exorcism in Utero
programme.desc: Herma finds a powerful ring that possesses her when she tries it on. As her body transforms and mind begins to deteriorate, she must find a way out to save herself and her unborn baby.

programme.title: Sharp Teeth
programme.desc: A nuclear leak mutates the fish in the lake next to the local university. Journalism student, Lola Dent sees this story as an opportunity to make the honor list.

programme.title: Armenian Haunting
programme.desc: An Armenian-American journalist turns into an unwilling ghost hunter while researching the sudden deaths in her family and their connection to a paranormal mystery.

programme.title: Carter's W.A.R. - S02:E05 - Capturing the Wild
programme.desc: After seeing the disappearance of wildlife in northern Africa, Ivan joins an elite capture team to see how wildlife is captured, bought, and sold. This 'Wildlife Trade' is a ground breaking business model that could change the entire face of conservation in Africa.

programme.title: Wild Ones - S01:E01 - Dangerous on Land
programme.desc: This episode offers an exciting look at nature with close-ups of wild cats, snakes, crocodiles, scorpions, etc., focusing on the animals' methods of defense or predation (venom, teeth, claws, size, etc.). In this episode you will learn all about the wild world of dangerous animals

programme.title: Wild Ones - S01:E02 - Fastest
programme.desc: The fastest? The explosive sprinting cheetah? The mighty kangaroo? The horned and leaping wildebeest? The powerful and sure-footed horse? Or the swift-footed pronghorn? Which is the fastest over land?

programme.title: Wild Ones - S01:E03 - Biggest
programme.desc: The Biggest? An Elephant? A Giraffe? A Hippopotamus? Or the humpback whale which is three times longer than the tallest giraffe and weighs more than a dozen hippos. But which is the biggest of them all?

programme.title: Wild Ones - S01:E04 - Smartest
programme.desc: Are animals smart? You bet. But which is the smartest of them all? The socially complex chimpanzee? The inventive bolas spider? The architectural termite? The curious dolphin? Or the inimitable octopus?

programme.title: The Trail - S01:E09 - Thriving
programme.desc: Stocked up on food, Laramy and Seven thrive in their new location. Laramy focuses on building some amenities to make life easier on The Trail.

programme.title: The Trail - S01:E10 - Return Home
programme.desc: Laramy and Seven say goodbye to their final camp and head back home.

programme.title: Sasquatch Mountain Man - S01:E01 - British Colombia Moose
programme.desc: Meet Laramy Sasquatch Miller, one of the last mountain men of the Rocky Mountains. Follow Laramy as he attempts to harvest a huge Canadian moose.Born of Indian ancestry and trained by true Mountain Men, Laramy Sasquatch Miller uses only a handmade bow and a traditional .54 caliber Hawken Rifle to travel the route the mountain men did. From deep in the Canadian Rockies to the plains of the Midwest hunting, trapping and surviving off the land.

programme.title: Sasquatch Mountain Man - S01:E02 - Grizzly Part 1
programme.desc: Big game or small Laramy knows he possesses the time honoured skills to keep himself fed but now he is looking to hunt the fiercest of all - a real man-eater - the Grizzly.

programme.title: Savage Wild - S04:E10 - Wild Boars, Wild Nights Part 2
programme.desc: Bring out the dogs! Manny learns the most effective way to hunt wild boar.

programme.title: Miracles of Nature - S01:E01 - Naturally Breathtaking
programme.desc: Do you know where in the world the last untouched glacier is? Where is the highest and the smallest waterfall? Which desert is the driest or the largest? Would you like to know where the most inaccessible mountains, the lowest point of the oceans or the great salt deserts are? This series offers all the answers.In the first episode, we discover breathtaking glaciers in Argentina, infinite plane in the middle of Europe, thermal miracles of Hungary, stalactite caves protected by UNESCO and the most active volcano in New Zealand – White island.

programme.title: Miracles of Nature - S01:E02 - Naturally Dramatic
programme.desc: This episode describes the greatest miracle of nature that could be created by the human brain. The Loch Ness monster. It looks that is does not exist but thousands of visitors still come to see the lovely lake and to hear tales about it. Not only Nessi, but the Scottish high lands are the miracle of nature.Then we quickly visit Andalusia and remove our hat in front of the majestic mountains of Sierra Nevada.The deepest lake in the world is found in Siberia. We will talk about Baikal, the natural miracle of Russia.

Worse still, strange things surfacing around him indicate that his journey to the Far East has deep, divine implications. The stage is set for him to take the 1st bite of true love and end the cycle of suffering for all involved.

With the feeling that something strange is going on with Illis, Clara Inés visits 'her mother' in her room; the impostor tries to manipulate Clara.

programme.title: El Desprecio
programme.desc: Pastora boasts to Elisenda about having sent Cirilo to prison and humiliating Clara at the police station.

programme.title: Te Tengo en Salsa
programme.desc: César and Carlos Raúl await Adriana's arrival until she surprises them with her immediate and irrevocable resignation.

programme.title: Te Tengo en Salsa
programme.desc: Back at the restaurant, Patricia breaks down in tears, announcing to her family that there will be no more business because she has no money to do so.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Roberto returns and wants to meet Camila to remember old times. Max will understand that she was not a prostitute. Gregorio and Julia in a hotel surprised by Ezequiel. Evidence proving that Marcos did not commit suicide and that Ezequiel is the guilty one.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Max asks Camila to marry him, she does not accept, she recognizes that she loves him, but knowing the truth he would be disappointed and would walk away. Roberto threatens to tell Max what he knows and will talk to Camila to negotiate his silence. Rosa Blanco wants revenge.

programme.title: Corazon Traicionado
programme.desc: The Corona house begins to dress up for the celebration of the marriage between Lorena and Alberto. Gertrudis reminds Lorena of her pact of silence and threatens her with her life Alberto has a "man-to-man" conversation with little Ignacio. The innocent child asks what is going to happen to his father "Guille".

programme.title: DEBATE INMOBILIARIO

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Ante las intenciones de Ezequiel, Octavia y Marcelina agreden verbalmente a Camila. Max le propone y Camila duda pero accede a casarse con él. En una cena, Ezequiel reúne a sus hijos y Camila será la homenajeada especial.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: En la cena, el tema principal será Rosa Blanco. Ezequiel dice que esa mujer fue una oportunista que enamoró y se aprovechó de su hermano menor, Leoncio. Astrid ofende agregando que fue una prostituta, culpable de la guerra entre las dos familias por su relación con Augusto Aragón y también con Leoncio López.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Camila no entiende por qué su madre regresa para vengarse y el motivo de tanto odio. Madre Isabel, Padre Tiziano y Elda, guardan un cómplice silencio. Max enfrenta a Roberto y Camila reacciona con celos y rabia.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Camila miente sobre su relación con Roberto. Max está muy golpeado y esta situación la aprovecha Astrid que se le insinúa mucho, pero él la rechaza. Ezequiel humillando y maltratando a Leandro, su hijo enfermo.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Camila dice toda la verdad a Max y confiesa que lo ama, sin embargo, en un nuevo encuentro le pide que confíe en ella mientras trata de resolver el asunto que tanto los atormenta. Roberto, está decidido a matar a Max.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Roberto le pide a Astrid que le consiga un trabajo en Mascarada a cambio de no hacer nada contra Max. Camila confiesa a Max que Roberto la chantajea. Luciano y el inspector interrogan a la Madre Isabel y al Padre Tiziano sobre Rosa Blanco y ellos mienten.

programme.title: 72 Horas Para Morir
programme.desc: Su madre lo dejo en manos de su padre siendo un niño y el lo preparo para ser un gatillero y hacerse cargo del territorio de Texas, por eso lo apodan el Texano. Un día en la calle se encuentra con una mujer y ella le adivina su futuro, le dice que tiene 72 horas para morir... el texano no lo cree pero algo muy malo esta por suceder.

programme.title: Vigilia
programme.desc: Santiago amanece desnudo y golpeado en medio del desierto. El joven se incorpora muy aturdido y retorna a su casa paterna.

programme.title: Soy Una Buena Persona
programme.desc: Sabina es una treintañera muy "artista" convencida de que podrá algún día vivir de su arte como diseñadora, actriz, guionista o directora, porque ella está destinada a petarlo. Mientras, como casi toda su generación, malvive gorroneando en casa de sus padres. Pero una noche tiene, por desgracia ajena, una oportunidad de lujo... y no dudará en aprovecharla sin pensárselo demasiado.

programme.title: Asesinos Sin Ley
programme.desc: Mickey y Jenny son imigrantes indocumentados, un dia el patrón de Jenny trata de abusar de ella, Mickey lo sorprende y lo mata haceindo justicia por su propia mano así se desatan una cacería de criminales abusadores, todo lo sueben a las redes convirtiéndose en los anti-héroes más populares por hacer justicia a los desamparados.

programme.title: El Cóndor En Nueva York
programme.desc: Un narcotraficante de Nueva York, llamado Damián, ha creado una nueva droga con efectos impactantes. Después de varias muertes accidentales, la DEA y la policía se embarcan en una búsqueda inútil en busca de este jefe de la mafia. Damián comienza a derrotar a su competencia con la ayuda de su científico privado y un informante de la DEA. El hijo del alcalde Martínez (de Súper Cóndor) queda en coma tras consumir el nuevo medicamento. El alcalde Martínez vuela a Nueva York desde Perú para comenzar su propia investigación en busca de Damián y una cura. Todo parece sombrío para los agentes de la DEA, el alcalde Martínez y su hijo; hasta que llegue la ayuda. El Cóndor llega a Nueva York desde Perú para ayudar a revertir los efectos de esta nueva y brutal droga y llevar a Damián ante la justicia.

programme.title: Esposa de Vacaciones
programme.desc: Aprovechando la ausencia de su esposa, un hombre se sumerge en las tentaciones que ofrece el ciber espacio y conoce a una mujer casada. Ellos vivirán un romance idílico sin dimensionar las consecuencias.

programme.title: Asesinos Sin Ley
programme.desc: Mickey y Jenny son imigrantes indocumentados, un dia el patrón de Jenny trata de abusar de ella, Mickey lo sorprende y lo mata haceindo justicia por su propia mano así se desatan una cacería de criminales abusadores, todo lo sueben a las redes convirtiéndose en los anti-héroes más populares por hacer justicia a los desamparados.

programme.title: The Man with the Golden Arm
programme.desc: Un exadicto a la heroína intenta reconstruir su vida como baterista de jazz, pero el crimen, la manipulación y la tentación amenazan con arrastrarlo de nuevo a su oscuro pasado.

programme.title: The Amazing Mr. X
programme.desc: Una viuda en duelo es seducida por un espiritista que afirma poder contactar a su difunto esposo, pero nada es lo que parece.

programme.title: A Bucket of Blood
programme.desc: Un camarero de un café beatnik se convierte en un artista asesino para alimentar su nueva fama.
